prompt.content:
Revise the MTSI merger analysis in the model as follows:
1.	Change % cash consideration to 10%
2.	Change % SG&A synergies to 80%
3.	Change % Bid Premium to 25%
4.	Update the share price for RMBS and MTSI to the closing price at 01/07/2026.
Calculate and output the following:
1.	% Value Accretion/(Dilution) to RMBS Shareholders
2.	% Value Accretion/(Dilution) to MTSI Shareholders
Round all % to 2 decimal places.

rubrics.name: States the % Value Accretion/(Dilution) to RMBS Shareholders is (3.00%) (ver_20919e1d998d4a88992efd76549e7e82)

messages.content: States the % Value Accretion/(Dilution) to RMBS Shareholders is (3.00%).

rubrics.name: States the % Value Accretion/(Dilution) to MTSI Shareholders is 9.13%... (ver_6613bdbb48434e6e9dd3d302e5c2bd4f)

messages.content: States the % Value Accretion/(Dilution) to MTSI Shareholders is 9.13% (acceptable range 9.04% to 9.22%).
